case_title: PACIFIC COAST SALES & SERVICE INC. VS UP & DOWNS et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO UP & DOWNS RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $305.00 FILED BY PACIFIC COAST SALES & SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UP & DOWNS RAINBOW APPAREL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC COAST SALES & SERVICE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UP & DOWNS $305.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $325.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
